subjects.description: captivating mermaid in a luminous summer dress
subjects.appearance_details: graceful aquatic figure with shimmering dress fabric, flowing hair, and a subtle iridescent tail beneath the clear water
subjects.relationship: single ethereal subject moving through the sunny ocean
subjects.location: midwater foreground against a broad azure sea
subjects.relative_size: medium figure, elegant and central against the vast ocean backdrop
subjects.orientation: angled diagonally through the water, face and torso turned toward filtered sunlight
subjects.pose: arms extended softly while gliding with a fluid tail motion
subjects.action: maneuvers gracefully through transparent ocean water as sunlight dances across her dress
subjects.state_changes: dress glimmers, hair drifts, bubbles trail, body arcs gently through the water
subjects.clothing: luminous summer dress that glows and ripples in the sunlight
subjects.expression: serene, enchanted, and absorbed in the underwater motion
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: soft sunlit skin with watery highlights and natural texture
subjects.facial_features: delicate features, calm eyes, relaxed mouth, hair framing the face

background_setting: Clear azure ocean on a bright sunny day with transparent water, sparkling wave patterns above, soft shafts of sunlight, drifting bubbles, and an open panoramic sea backdrop.

lighting.conditions: Warm direct sunlight filters through the water, creating golden caustic patterns on the mermaid, dress, and surrounding waves.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm direct sunlight filters through the water, creating golden caustic patterns on the mermaid, dress, and surrounding waves.

aesthetics.composition: Dreamlike aquatic beauty, clear blue water, luminous fabric, gentle bubbles, and shimmering sunlit motion.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Dreamlike aquatic beauty, clear blue water, luminous fabric, gentle bubbles, and shimmering sunlit motion.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth underwater medium shot following the mermaid, with a slow widening move toward a panoramic ocean view.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Photorealistic fantasy text-to-video with live action underwater realism.
artistic_style: Ethereal ocean fantasy with golden highlights, fluid motion, and serene summer brightness.
context: A graceful mermaid glides through clear ocean water on a sunny day, her luminous summer dress catching shifting sunlight beneath the waves.

actions.description: The mermaid glides into view through transparent blue water as sunlight flickers across her luminous dress.
She maneuvers in a slow arc, hair and fabric floating while bubbles drift around her.
The camera widens to reveal sparkling waves and the vast azure sea surrounding her.

segments.description: Reveal the mermaid in clear ocean water under bright sunlight.
segments.key_changes: Golden caustics begin to shimmer across her dress and skin.
segments.camera: Underwater medium shot drifting beside her.

segments.description: Follow her graceful turn through the water.
segments.key_changes: Hair, dress, bubbles, and tail motion create layered fluid movement.
segments.camera: Smooth lateral tracking camera with gentle parallax.

segments.description: Expand to a panoramic view of the sparkling sea with the mermaid centered.
segments.key_changes: Ocean scale becomes clear, waves glitter above, her motion slows.
segments.camera: Slow pullback to a wide underwater composition.

temporal_caption: A serene mermaid in a luminous summer dress glides through transparent ocean water while sunlight flickers across the azure sea.
audio_description: Muffled underwater ambience, soft bubble streams, gentle water movement, and distant wave shimmer above.
